purpose: Define canonical source classes for Capital Radar. OpenClaw must collect institution-grade, company-verified, and market-structure evidence before synthesizing holding zones or strategy actions.

tier_1_company_verified.description: Primary company disclosures and official events. Highest authority for company fundamentals and guidance.

tier_2_institutional_positioning.description: Large investor and institutional positioning evidence. Used for ownership, accumulation, sponsorship, and crowding analysis.

tier_3_market_structure.description: Price, volume, volatility, and flow evidence used to generate action zones and market-tape confirmation.

tier_4_research_interpretation.description: Broker, media, analyst, and agent synthesis. Useful only when tied back to tier 1-3 evidence.

strategy_rules: No holding-zone level may be promoted from proxy_v1 to institutional without at least one tier_1_company_verified or tier_2_institutional_positioning source plus one tier_3_market_structure source.
No buy/add permission may be generated from institutional positioning alone.
No market strategy posture may upgrade risk-on if data truth is blocked or stale for critical market-tape signals.
Narrative claims must reference evidence IDs. Price-zone claims must reference zone_source_ids.
Institutional ownership is evidence of sponsorship or crowding, not proof of future return.
